articles.title: Mushfiqur ton, Litton and Joy fifties set Pakistan 437
articles.description: Shahzad picked up four wickets but Mushfiqur ensured Bangladesh remained well in front

articles.title: Lanka Premier League returns after two years, opener set for July 17
articles.description: Sri Lanka's T20 franchise competition returns for the first time since its 2024 edition, with the player draft scheduled for June 1

articles.title: BCB elections to elect new president to be held on June 7
articles.description: Former Bangladesh captain Tamim Iqbal is the current BCB president

articles.title: Pakistan name Iram Javed in T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: They will first travel to Ireland, where they play a tri-series that also includes West Indies

articles.title: Pakistan lose eight WTC points for slow over rate in first Test against Bangladesh
articles.description: Pakistan were eight overs short of the target and are now placed eighth on the WTC table with 11.11% points

articles.title: ICC suspends funding to Cricket Canada over governance-related issues
articles.description: ESPNcricinfo understands the funding suspension will not impact any cricket activities, including high performance programmes

articles.title: Fatima Sana smashes fastest fifty in women's T20Is
articles.description: Her 15-ball effort broke the record previous held by Sophie Devine, Phoebe Litchfield and Richa Ghosh, off 18 balls

articles.title: ICC meetings set to revisit WTC format structure, one-Test series proposals
articles.description: One of the recommendations is to bring Zimbabwe, Ireland and Afghanistan into the WTC

articles.title: Saudi Arabia set to launch Dunes League T20 in October
articles.description: It will be Saudi Arabia's first franchise league, and is expected to feature retired 'legends' who are still active in the franchise circuit

articles.title: India's Test tour of Sri Lanka to be conducted between August 15 and 27
articles.description: The two-match series is part of the 2025-27 ICC World Test Championship (WTC) cycle.

articles.title: Jasprit Bumrah could play Test against Afghanistan, will miss the ODI series as part of workload management
articles.description: Bumrah is currently competing in the 2026 Indian Premier League, having played in all 12 matches for the Mumbai Indians.

articles.title: 'International contract outweighs any franchise' - Michael Vaughan disappointed at Jofra Archer's IPL over England Tests situation
articles.description: The former captain strongly believes that the ECB should have more control over its players.
